name: co.thinair/data
description: Read-only PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server access via MCP — 24 dialect-aware hosted tools.

apiKey.title: ThinAir Data API Key
apiKey.description: Get a key at https://data.thinair.co/connect (paste your database DSN, receive a ta_data_* key). Paste it here and the MCP client will send it as a Bearer header on every call.
